title: The Most Important Gates in Quantum Computing Explained
summary: IBM Technology's educational video explains fundamental quantum computing gates including Hadamard and CNOT gates. The content covers qubits, superposition, and entanglement as foundational concepts for understanding quantum circuits and their operations.
